scope: fresh Chapters 1–3 factory regeneration under one generic writer-priority amendment
pre_amendment_boundary: d9340bf — run-008 §11 escalation committed; no Chapter 3 promoted
operator_authority_resolution: HARNESS §1 grants full calibration-lab design authority and says decide, log, proceed; main merge remains founder-approved

inherited_artifacts.old_chapters: excluded from every first-draft input; existing live Chapters 1–2 remain rollback controls only

amendment.single_generic_lever: make evidence permission and current-chapter ownership explicitly outrank assertiveness, analogy, and persuasive completion
amendment.rule_exact: Evidence and chapter ownership outrank assertiveness. State the assigned belief reframe firmly, but never turn a lived report, analogy, scene, cultural observation, or plausible explanation into a causal mechanism, prevalence or exposure claim, diagnosis, universal pathway, or promised effect unless the current chapter card owns that claim and the evidence ledger's permitted inference supports it. If either condition is absent, stop at the card's observable or belief-level claim—or report the gap; never fill it with persuasive inference.
amendment.self_check_exact: Trace every causal, mechanism, prevalence, diagnosis, and promised-effect assertion to the current chapter card and a permitted evidence inference; cut it or report a gap if either trace is missing.

experiment.unit: three fresh sequential chapters, not one repaired chapter
experiment.first_draft_commission_exact: Produce the strongest complete final-book chapter assigned by the embedded master plan. This is a fresh first draft: use only the embedded shared inputs, exercise your full judgment, and satisfy the writer contract without narrating your process. Return only the complete chapter, beginning with its Chapter number and title.
excluded_from_first_drafts: run history, hypotheses, ledgers, reports, and judge outputs
experiment.normal_gate: fresh Sol ultra review; at most three writer-review cycles per chapter; revision cycles may receive only the current draft and its raw latest review in addition to fixed semantic inputs
experiment.prompt_freeze: no shared asset, commission, threshold, or reviewer change after Chapter 1 generation begins
experiment.failure_rule: if any chapter exhausts three cycles, close the run before tuning; diagnose across the whole frozen three-chapter attempt
experiment.promotion: replace live Chapters 1–3 only as one accepted set; never promote an isolated run-009 chapter as a factory result

causal_decision_rule.supported: zero target evidence or chapter-ownership blockers in all three first-draft reviews, all three chapters accepted within the fixed gate, objective gate passes, and blind Stage-A judge gate passes
causal_decision_rule.refuted: the target blocker appears in at least two first drafts or survives in any final-cycle artifact
causal_decision_rule.inconclusive: the target blocker appears once and is repaired, or target blockers disappear but an unrelated product dimension prevents the blind Stage-A gate
causal_decision_rule.target_blocker: unowned or unsupported causal mechanism, prevalence or exposure claim, diagnosis, universal pathway, or promised effect

stage_a_product_gates.objective: run_evals.py --chapters 1-3 exits 0; no unlicensed repetition; cross-overlap below 0.3%
stage_a_product_gates.length: each chapter within 20% of its plan budget
stage_a_product_gates.judge: overall win-rate at least 0.45; every dimension at least 0.35; real-Carr detection at most 0.70; zero critical failures
stage_a_product_gates.support_boundary: reviewer acceptance alone is never success
stage_a_product_gates.stability: a pass requires run-010 with zero amendments before Stage A exit

held_constant: accepted research, framing, and normalized master plan
native Sol ultra chapter reviewers with no time or reasoning cap

judges.route: OpenRouter for canonical panel, native fallback recorded if required

direction: factory restart across Chapters 1–3; no Chapter 3 tuning and no main merge
notes: The exact two-sentence generic amendment is committed at 88b6889 and now frozen for the complete three-chapter run. No model call has run.
